title: Netherite Anvil & More Enchantments!
description: Expand your gear enhancement options with new vanilla-style enchantments and a more functional Netherite Anvil.
body:
# ⚒️ Netherite Anvil ![Netherite Anvil and Hammer Mod Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/846dddb68c67d16fb306217720e12c8da26d841f.jpeg) > **Break the limits of the vanilla anvil.** > Forge stronger gear with the Netherite Anvil, Synthesis Table, custom enchantments, and expanded combining rules. --- ## 🆕 Version 1.2.0 Update - 🧪 **Added new block: Synthesis Table** --- ## ✨ Highlights | | Feature | |---|---| | 🪨 | **Netherite Anvil** — An upgraded anvil with an extra material slot for reducing enchantment costs | | 🔓 | **No more "Too Expensive"** — Removes the vanilla anvil cost limit | | 🧪 | **Synthesis Table** — A new block for synthesizing custom enchantment books | | 📖 | **12 Custom Enchantments** — Reach, Swiftness, Lightweight, Quick Draw, Sparing, Arrow Velocity, Glide, Multi-Catch, Glow Sight, Berserk, Recovery, Bone Breaker | | 🛡️ | **Extended Protection** — Combine up to **2 protection-type enchantments** on a single piece of gear | --- ## 📖 Custom Enchantments
📚 View all custom enchantments
| Enchantment | Target | Summary | |---|---|---| | 🔍 **Reach** | Tools / Weapons | Increased interaction distance | | 💨 **Swiftness** | Boots | Increased movement speed | | ⚡ **Lightweight** | Swords / Axes | Faster attack cooldown recovery | | 🏹 **Quick Draw** | Bows | Faster bow charging | | 🪶 **Sparing** | Bows | Chance to prevent arrow consumption | | 🚀 **Arrow Velocity** | Bows | Increased arrow initial velocity | | 🪂 **Glide** | Elytra | Improved gliding acceleration and speed | | 🎣 **Multi-Catch** | Fishing Rods | Enhanced fishing rewards | | 🌙 **Glow Sight** | Helmets | Grants Night Vision | | 🔥 **Berserk** | Chestplates | Grants Strength based on remaining health | | 💚 **Recovery** | Leggings | Restores health when only one heart remains | | 🦴 **Bone Breaker** | Axes / Mace | Applies Fracture on hit | ---
🔍 Reach | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Tools / Weapons | | Effect | Increases interaction distance |
💨 Swiftness | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Boots | | Effect | Increases movement speed |
⚡ Lightweight | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Swords / Axes | | Effect | Increases attack cooldown recovery | | Value | **+10% / +15% / +30%** |
🏹 Quick Draw | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Bows | | Effect | Increases bow charge speed | | Value | **+10% / +20% / +30%** |
🪶 Sparing | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Bows | | Max Level | I | | Incompatible With | Infinity | | Effect | Has a chance to prevent arrow consumption | | Note | Arrows affected by this enchantment cannot be picked up, just like Infinity arrows |
🚀 Arrow Velocity | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Bows | | Effect | Increases arrow initial velocity | | Value | **+20% / +30% / +50%** |
🪂 Glide | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Elytra | | Effect | Increases acceleration and max speed while gliding |
🎣 Multi-Catch | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Fishing Rods | | Effect | Enhances fishing rewards |
🌙 Glow Sight | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Helmets | | Effect | Grants Night Vision | | Application | Applied directly with Glow Ore using the Netherite Anvil |
🔥 Berserk | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Chestplates | | Max Level | I | | Effect 1 | Grants **Strength I** at or below **60% max health** | | Effect 2 | Grants **Strength II** at or below **30% max health** |
💚 Recovery | | Details | |---|---| | Target | Leggings | | Max Level | III | | Activation | Activates when only **one heart** remains | | Effect | Restores health for a short time | | Cooldown | **10 minutes** | | Display | Leggings on cooldown display the cooldown text in red |
🦴 Bone Breaker | | Details | |---|---| | Target | All axe materials, vanilla Mace | | Max Level | III | | Effect | Applies **Fracture I–III** on hit | | Debuff | Reduces movement speed for **5 seconds** | | Excluded Targets | Ender Dragon, Wither, Warden, and boss-type mobs |
--- ## 📋 How to Use ### 1️⃣ Craft the Netherite Anvil ![Combine **3 Netherite Ingots** + **1 vanilla Anvil** at a crafting table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8870187fb209596bda57dbf5c0ac64ac002aa40.png) Combine **3 Netherite Ingots** + **1 vanilla Anvil** at a crafting table. --- ### 2️⃣ Netherite Anvil Slot Layout - **Left slot** — Target gear - **Middle slot** — Enchanted book or combining item - **Extra slot** — Cost reduction material --- ### 3️⃣ Cost Reduction Materials | Material | Effect | |---|---| | 💎 Diamond Block | **−1** per block | | 🔶 Netherite Ingot | **−1** per ingot | | ⭐ Nether Star | **−10** per star | --- ### 4️⃣ Applying Glow Sight Place **Glow Ore** in the middle slot instead of a book. **Helmet + Glow Ore** → applies **Glow Sight I** for just **1 level**. --- ## 🗺️ Enchantment Book Sources
📚 View all sources
🔍 Reach I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Bastion Treasure chest | `15%` | | Bastion Generic chest | `15%` | | Bastion Bridge chest | `15%` | | Bastion Hoglin Stable chest | `15%` | | Trial Chamber rare reward | `20%` | | Ocean Ruin large chest | `10%` | | Ocean Ruin small chest | `10%` | | Stronghold Library chest | `20%` | | Piglin barter | `1%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
💨 Swiftness I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Trial Chamber rare reward | `20%` | | Woodland Mansion chest | `20%` | | Nether Fortress chest | `20%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
⚡ Lightweight I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Nether Fortress chest | `20%` | | Pillager Outpost chest | `20%` | | Woodland Mansion chest | `35%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
🏹 Quick Draw I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Bastion Treasure chest | `25%` | | Bastion Generic chest | `25%` | | Bastion Bridge chest | `25%` | | Bastion Hoglin Stable chest | `25%` | | Trial Chamber rare reward | `30%` | | Abandoned Mineshaft chest | `15%` | | Shipwreck treasure chest | `7%` | | Stronghold Library chest | `20%` | | Piglin barter | `1%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
🚀 Arrow Velocity I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Ocean Ruin large chest | `20%` | | Ocean Ruin small chest | `20%` | | Buried Treasure | `20%` | | End City chest | `20%` | | Desert Pyramid chest | `15%` | | Ancient City chest | `20%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
🪂 Glide I | Source | Chance | |---|---| | End City chest | `20%` | | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included |
🎣 Multi-Catch | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Fishing treasure book pool | 📚 Included | | Librarian villager trade | Rarely included |
🦴 Bone Breaker I | At the Synthesis Table | |---| | Smite III or higher enchanted book + Knockback II or higher enchanted book |
🔥 Berserk I | At the Synthesis Table | |---| | Thorns enchanted book + 30 Ghast Tears |
🪶 Sparing I | At the Synthesis Table | |---| | Infinity enchanted book + Mending enchanted book |
💚 Recovery I | At the Synthesis Table | |---| | Protection-type enchanted book + Enchanted Golden Apple | **Protection types:** Protection / Fire Protection / Blast Protection / Projectile Protection
🌙 Glow Sight > ⚠️ Cannot be obtained as an enchanted book. Apply it directly with **Glow Ore** using the **Netherite Anvil**. | Source | Chance | |---|---| | Ancient City chest | `25%` |
--- ## 🎯 Who It's For - ⚔️ Players who want stronger progression and gear scaling beyond vanilla - 🏰 Server operators and solo players looking for more reasons to explore, farm, and upgrade gear - 🧪 Players who enjoy custom enchantment systems
